description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined, elongated body and a slightly curved, robust beak. The plumage is predominantly dark brown and gray, with some lighter and rusty patches along the wings and tail. The head is rounded and the beak is thick and slightly hooked at the tip, suggesting a predatory or scavenging bird. The wings are broad and the tail is relatively short and rounded, with a subtle wedge shape. The legs are tucked beneath the body and appear to be a muted grayish color. The surface texture of the feathers is matte and slightly rough, with visible layering and natural irregularities.
description: A medium-sized, dark brown and gray bird with a robust, slightly hooked beak and a rounded, wedge-shaped tail. The plumage is mottled and the surface appears matte and slightly rough.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, broad wings, and slightly hooked beak.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded head, short tail, and tucked legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bird's streamlined profile and subtle color variations in the plumage.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the thick beak, rounded head, and the symmetry of the wings and tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled with solid and gradient patches of brown and gray
